sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 3

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 3:1
items.html: (to the question) Since all the GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] of the lower one rise together with their upper one when it ascends as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to its upper-upper for the sake of its Mochin of Gadlut, both are found — the MAN of the lower one with the MAN of the upper one — incorporated in the Zivug [coupling] of the upper-upper. And since these two kinds of MAN are not equal to one another from their origin, it is necessary that the level of ten Sefirot that emerged upon these two kinds of MAN should contain two parts: one attributed to the MAN of the upper one, and one attributed to the MAN of the lower one (see Answer 107 nearby). Thus two parts of Lights are incorporated in the AHP of the upper one, for the upper one takes them both, in the secret of "the firstborn takes a double portion," since the discernment of the lower one still has no form at all by which it could receive its share. (Item 101)
